arts.ttl: Why are Arsenal wearing an all-white kit at home against Manchester United in the FA Cup?
arts.sum: For the fourth year in a row, Arsenal will wear an-all white kit as part of a campaign aimed at reducing knife crime on the streets of London. It was the murder of 16-year-old Arsenal fan Ben Kinsella in 2008 that led to the creation of an anti- knife crime charity in his memory, which now partners with the club; 10 teenage deaths occurred in 2023 with 9 of them stabbings.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright makes Arsenal January transfer window demand amid worrying admission
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side are six points adrift of Premier League leaders Liverpool and are 2-0 down after the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final against Newcastle United. "You look at this season with the extra Carabao Cup games and Champions League games, there has been injuries in the squad.

arts.ttl: 6 Premier League clubs at risk of being charged THIS WEEK including Man Utd
arts.sum: Six teams were required to submit their accounts by December 31st after being deemed at risk of breaching the Premier League's profit and sustainability rules for the 2021-24 period

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Napoli would actually prefer to sign another Manchester United player instead of Alejandro Garnacho
Arsenal terms to sign Nico Williams revealed by David Ornstein
arts.sum: David Ornstein has revealed the terms that Arsenal must meet in order to sign Nico Williams from Athletic Bilbao. Arsenal terms to sign Nico Williams revealed by David Ornstein

arts.ttl: Arsenal scouts “keeping tabs” on Bundesliga star ahead of a potential move
arts.sum: Arsenal are keeping tabs on the Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman. According to former Premier League scout Mick Brown, Arsenal have had scouts in Germany keeping tabs on the player and it will be interesting to see if they decide to make a move for him in the near future. “Kingsley Coman has always been […] The post Arsenal scouts “keeping tabs” on Bundesliga star ahead of a potential move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Man Utd - TV channel, live stream, FA Cup kick-off time
arts.sum: Everything you need to know ahead of the FA Cup third round clash between Arsenal and Manchester United, including TV channel, live stream details and team news

arts.ttl: Arsenal squad v Man United revealed as Mikel Arteta faces key Raheem Sterling selection decision
arts.sum: The winger on loan from Chelsea returned to the matchday squad for the first time since the League Cup quarter-final when the Gunners played their first leg in the next round of that competition versus Newcastle United . Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard have yet failed to take their chances to deputise for Saka, so Arteta could turn to Sterling when Man United visit north London for the second time in five-and-a-half weeks.

arts.ttl: Napoli 'lining up move for Man United winger Alejandro Garnacho to replace PSG-bound Khvicha Kvaratskhelia' - as 'Red Devils set their asking price'
arts.sum: Garnacho has been benched for the last five matches and was dropped entirely for United's victory over Manchester City, alongside wantaway Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling drops early Arsenal team news hint amid Mikel Arteta's Martin Odegaard issue
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has dropped a team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Manchester United . With that being said, Arteta will be hoping Odegaard, with help from Sterling and Jorginho, can lead Arsenal to victory.
